Header alignment (experimental).

### Changed
- Nudged the list column header up (`margin-top: -6px`) so it lines up with the now-playing panel header. This one is calibratable — if it's off, the value can be adjusted.

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
